name: Prompt Injection Defense: Layered Strategies
description: Prompt injection is not a theoretical attack. By Q1 2026, the benchmark is real: CaMeL achieves 67% injection block rate on AgentDojo. NIST AI RMF frames it as agent hijacking. Defense is not a single gate; it's depth.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Defesa contra Prompt Injection
pt-BR.description: Prompt injection não é um ataque teórico. Proteja aplicações contra manipulação de prompt com estratégias em camadas.
